settings.description: API keys required by nodes in this library

metadata.author: Griptape
metadata.description: Griptape Nodes for Black Forest Labs APIs including FLUX.1 Kontext and FLUX text-to-image generation and image editing

image/black_forest_labs.title: Image/Black Forest Labs
image/black_forest_labs.description: FLUX nodes for image generation and editing

metadata.description: Combine an image, a mask and a text prompt to create a new image
Generate high-quality images from text prompts using FLUX Pro, Dev, and Ultra models
Edit existing images using FLUX.1 Kontext with text prompts for object modification, text editing, and smart changes
Generate images using FLUX 2 Pro and Flex models with support for text-to-image and image-to-image
